title: Phase 21.1 — Discovered Data Integrity Audit

error_explanation.what_happened: Phase 21 reported 619 URLs classified across categories (A-F), but GSC Pages report shows exactly 526 pages in 'Discovered - currently not indexed' group (item_key CAMYFiAC).
error_explanation.root_cause_1: The 619 number came from: 649 sitemap URLs MINUS 51 pages with GSC API 7-day impressions = 619. This is ALL sitemap pages without recent impressions, NOT just discovered-not-indexed pages.
error_explanation.root_cause_2: URL Inspection API verification of 10 drilldown-extracted URLs revealed that 5 of 10 are actually PASS/Submitted and indexed (they just have 0 impressions). Only 1 is truly 'Discovered - currently not indexed'. 5 are 'URL is unknown to Google'.
error_explanation.root_cause_3: The CloakBrowser text extraction used document.body.innerText regex, capturing ALL qfinhub.com URLs visible on the page — including GSC sidebar navigation, breadcrumbs, and indexed pages that appeared in the drilldown for other reasons.
error_explanation.conclusion: The 619 count is WRONG for the discovered-not-indexed group. It includes ~93 indexed-but-zero-impression pages and other non-discovered URLs.

corrected_understanding.total_gsc_known_pages: 252 indexed + 526 discovered + 70 noindex + 15 crawled-NI + 7 404 + 40 alt-canon + 2 other = ~912

verification_methods.url_inspection_10_sample: 5 PASS/indexed, 1 discovered-NI, 5 unknown-to-Google. Confirms drilldown text extraction captured mixed URLs.
verification_methods.gsc_api_pull: 51 pages have impressions. ~93 indexed pages have 0 impressions.
verification_methods.conclusion: The Phase 21 classification used the WRONG data source (sitemap minus impressions). Must rebuild from verified data.

confidence: HIGH — root cause confirmed by URL Inspection API cross-referencing. The 526 GSC count is authoritative.
